description: Project-local reference flow for the Claude example plugin.

prompt.inlineTemplate: Write exactly two lines. On the first line, write: I generated this proof for the AgentWeaver Claude example plugin with model <your exact model name>. Replace <your exact model name> with the exact model name you are currently using. On the second line, write a short original tagline of 4 to 8 words about AgentWeaver plugin wiring.

expect.message: The Claude example flow must write the fixed proof artifact.
